user.title: Pura Account
user.description: Enter your Pura account credentials — the same email and password you use in the Pura mobile app.

data_description.email: The email address registered with your Pura account.
data_description.password: Your Pura account password. If you registered with Apple, Google, or Facebook you must set a password in the Pura app first.

select_device.title: Select Diffuser
select_device.description: Found {device_count} Pura device(s) on your account. Select the diffuser to add. Run setup again for each additional diffuser.

abort.no_devices: No Pura devices were found on this account. Check that your devices are online in the Pura app.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Pura service. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. If you registered with Apple, Google, or Facebook you must set a password in the Pura app first.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
